name: agent-workflows
description: Local daemon that bridges signals (PR comments, etc.) to pluggable coding agents.

scripts.check:scripts: node --check scripts/setup.mjs && node --check scripts/doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/install-shared-skills.mjs
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include="src/**/*.ts" --test-coverage-lines=100 --test-coverage-branches=100 --test-coverage-functions=100 tests/agent-adapters.test.ts tests/core.test.ts tests/e2e.test.ts tests/github-poller.test.ts tests/github-state.test.ts tests/pr-comment.test.ts tests/pr-review.test.ts tests/setup.integration.test.ts tests/worktree.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: node --import tsx --test tests/agent-adapters.test.ts tests/github-poller.test.ts tests/pr-comment.test.ts tests/pr-review.test.ts tests/setup.integration.test.ts tests/worktree.test.ts
scripts.test:smoke: node dist/index.js --help && node dist/index.js help && node dist/index.js review --help
scripts.format: prettier --write src tests scripts .github package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.tests.json README.md docs
scripts.format:check: prettier --check src tests scripts .github package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.tests.json README.md docs
